reviews.review_text: I feel so sad leaving a negative review for this game because I really really did enjoy it, I even got my friends into it. But unfortunately the Devs abandoned the game to go work on yet another game they will ditch, I wont be buying anymore of Guns products and I recommend you also don't unless you want to be disappointed.

This game has the worst servers and matchmaking I have EVER seen in my life.

I spend more time staring at “waiting for players” than actually playing the game. At this point I know the lobby music better than my own family.

Every single lobby:

7/7 players
Somebody leaves
Back to 5/7
One guy joins
Another guy leaves
Lobby dies
Repeat for the next 40 years

How do you make a multiplayer game where nobody can actually PLAY multiplayer 💀

The real horror isn’t Leatherface.
It’s the servers.
It’s the matchmaking.
It’s whatever potato-powered toaster machine is running this game.

I launch the game excited to play and end up sitting there questioning every decision that led me to downloading this garbage.

And when you FINALLY get into a match after surviving the waiting simulator, somebody disconnects in 12 seconds and the whole game falls apart again. Incredible.

Honestly the devs need to seriously rethink what they’re doing because this is embarrassing.

0/10.

Even though the developers haven't released anything, the game still maintains a good online presence and is consistently optimized. So, I still recommend buying it for fans of Leatherface and co-op games.

while the game is not super played, I think it's good to promote a somewhat dbd competitor and have more variety. on steam charts there's about 300-400 avg players for quite some time, so it's by no means not played either
I spend more time in the lobby than actually playing the game. They should add an offline mode. I’m tired of waiting in the lobby
love this game have played on both ps5 and pc, i reckon the developers could of brought this back to something exciting but they just gave up.
Its Good but if it just had that story like Friday The 13th The Game and like a Tutorial... Then with all that the game would be PEAK!
A decent game tho alot has made it go down hill sadly coulda been alot better its a okay game  tho
Extremely buggy game can't even get into a match unplayable, infinite loading screens and freezes

needs playstation controller support. better than consoles. only issues were in rush week. randomly as the killer johnny freaks out until i spam attack. and museum mode has a lot of pop in. other than that works good.
best game to play with friends love to be part of the family and run round killing people so much fun at night much more intense
One of the best slasher games I've played, if only devs cared about this beautiful game.

If I could give this game 0 stars, I absolutely would.

The gameplay itself isn’t even the worst part - the REAL horror is spending an entire lifetime waiting in lobbies just to get into a single match. I launch the game excited to play, and by the time I finally find a match, I’ve aged 10 years and reconsidered all my life choices.

The matchmaking is beyond embarrassing. Players constantly leave, lobbies die every 30 seconds, and the game makes you sit there staring at a countdown simulator instead of actually playing. It’s honestly impressive how a multiplayer game can be THIS bad at letting people play multiplayer.

And when you FINALLY get into a game? Half the time someone disconnects anyway. Amazing experience. Truly revolutionary.

This game should be renamed “Texas Lobby Waiting Simulator.”

Save your money, save your time, and save your sanity.
the player base is extremely small and the other complaints are valid but my biggest issue is the map size it's so huge it's difficult to find anyone really whether killer or victim.

It was cool when it first came out. The devs were way over their head when it came out. Lots of promised content they never  delivered on, and no continuity to the game. If you buy this game, you will go into blind, with no playable tutorial, no guidance, and when you finally get into a match after searching for players for 20 minutes, you'll either die to killers with 1000 hrs or as killer, 3 or 4 survivors will find an 'exit' within 2 minutes. Just lost all of its potential charm, not even worth buying at discount.
The game is no longer getting updates but as a 1st day player, i do still find myself enjoying this game!

DO NOT BUY THIS GAME. i played the family and my game was broken. not letting me interact or attack, it also locked me in the basement saying i needed to wake grandpa despite him being lvl 4 and this morning when i tried to queue quickmatch i got dc from the lobby before i even joined AND got a 3 minute time penalty. this game is garbage.

The game is suffering from severe lag; every time I try to join a match, the lag is so bad that the game crashes. I’ve checked my memory and everything seems fine, so I hope the developers can fix this issue.

[b] This review is long overdue* [/b]

Every time the GC plays or someone recommends we play games like this, they always die within a week or a month of playing it, and I'm not talking about us abandoning it. This has happened with Friday the 13th, Deceive Inc, Knockout City, etc. Everyone either waits too long, or the devs just decide to screw us. In this case, it's both!

This goof Abdi recommended we play it, talking about “I’ll buy it after you, and then we can convince everyone to play”. I bought it in July of 2024, only to refund it because bro flopped. Then, when it's free on PSN and cheaper than a battle pass on Steam, he and his cronies decide to get it (and of course on PSN). I guess the devs heard about the motive and decided to screw Ahmed and I, since we were the only ones who bought it on Steam.

I can't prove it, but Dead by Daylight is responsible for this game and all their competition shutting down. Jokes aside, the number of times I’ve recommended we play that game(DBD) is insane, but you know, people would rather spend money on VC than a decade-old game with actual support that won't be delisted like the 100s of live service games these guys buy every year. It’s just so frustrating because my buddies and I were actually getting pretty good at the game (online lobbies were hilarious). We also had a full lobby in customs before the devs ultimately pulled the plug.

Screw Sumo Digital, and Stop Killing Games!!
if youre that one hitchhiker that tbagged me after throwing the whole game and youre reading this, PLEASE hop off my ♥♥♥♥, yes YOU Sauceyboss2007, AND PLEASE can you buy me an apple pie, thanks amigo
